name: Shanghai Zijiang Enterprise Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Zijiang Enterprise Group Co., Ltd. operates in the packaging and printing industry in China. The company offers PET performs and bottles, crown caps, plastic labels, sanitary article packaging products, PP closures, metallization paper and film products, printing ink products, plastic printing products, pail and jerry cans, film products, beverage products, paper printing products, and magnesium products, as well as BOPET and CPP films, PA film inks, and plastic containers for industrial products. It is also involved in the construction of scientific parks; and real estate activities. The company is based in Shanghai, China.
